name: Nori Rolls (Murreita)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together, except the nori sheets.
2. Allow the mixture to sit for one or more hours to absorb the flavors.
3. Set out the toasted nori sheets on a clean surface.
4. Place approximately 3/4 cup of filling onto each sheet of toasted nori.
5. Roll the nori tightly around the filling and cut into five slices.
Per roll: 125 calories, 3 grams protein, 2 grams fat, 24 grams carbohydrates, 0 grams cholesterol.
